Title: Verify location suggestions based on weather and history
Preconditions: User has logged in and granted location permissions
Test Data: Current weather (e.g., rainy), user history (visited cafes)
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app.
2. System detects location and weather conditions.
3. System displays a list of nearby suggestions.
Expected Result: Suggestions include weather-appropriate places (e.g., cafes for rainy days) and align with user history.

Title: Display suggested locations on map
Preconditions: User has received location suggestions
Test Data: List of 3 nearby places (e.g., restaurant, park, museum)
Test Steps:
1. User selects "Visualizza mappa" (View Map).
2. System opens map view.
3. Suggested locations are marked on the map.
Expected Result: All suggested locations are correctly plotted with labels.

Title: Modify suggestion frequency for categories
Preconditions: User has visited a place and rated it
Test Steps:
1. User opens "Modifica preferenze" (Edit Preferences).
2. User selects "restaurants" category.
3. User sets frequency to "always suggest."
Expected Result: System updates preference and increases restaurant suggestions in future recommendations.

Title: AI selects a location based on user questions
Preconditions: User has enabled AI interaction
Test Data: User question: "Where should I go for dinner?"
Test Steps:
1. User opens "Pathfinder" system.
2. User selects "Visualizza domanda" (View Question) and enters input.
3. System asks follow-up questions (e.g., "Do you prefer Italian?").
4. User selects a response (e.g., "Yes").
5. System displays a suggested location.
Expected Result: AI provides a relevant location suggestion matching user input.

Title: Open Yelp page for a suggested location
Preconditions: User has selected a location from suggestions
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location from the list.
2. User taps "Apertura pagina Yelp" (Open Yelp Page).
Expected Result: Yelp page for the selected location opens in the browser.

Title: Initiate call to a suggested location
Preconditions: User has selected a location with a phone number
Test Data: Suggested location: "Restaurant X" with phone number +123456789
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location from the list.
2. User taps "Chiamata al luogo" (Call Place).
Expected Result: System initiates a call to the location’s phone number.

Title: Access settings page
Preconditions: User is logged in
Test Steps: 1. User taps "Accesso pagina impostazioni" (Access Settings Page).
Expected Result: Settings page loads with options for preferences, account, and app settings.

Title: Accesso pagina suggerimenti
Preconditions: L’applicazione deve essere installata sul dispositivo
Test Steps: 1. Avviare l’applicazione
Expected Result: Vengono visualizzati i luoghi suggeriti e l’utente può scorrere tra i vari suggerimenti

Title: Accesso schermata dettagliata
Preconditions: Selezione pagina schermata dettagliata
Test Steps: 1. Cliccare su uno dei luoghi raccomandati
Expected Result: Vengono visualizzate informazioni dettagliate sul luogo selezionato

Title: Visualizzazione mappa e dettagli luogo
Preconditions: Selezione pagina schermata dettagliata
Test Steps: 1. Cliccare su uno dei luoghi raccomandati
Expected Result: Viene visualizzato il luogo su una mappa

Title: Modifica preferenze luogo
Preconditions: Selezione pagina schermata dettagliata
Test Steps:
1. Cliccare su uno dei luoghi raccomandati
2. Premere il tasto “visitato”
3. Premere i tasti like e dislike
Expected Result: L’utente può modificare le proprie preferenze

Title: Chiamata al numero di telefono del luogo
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dettagliata di uno dei luoghi, il luogo ha un numero di telefono
Test Data: Un luogo con numero di telefono
Test Steps: 1. Cliccare sul tasto “Chiama business”
Expected Result: Viene avviata una chiamata al numero di telefono del luogo

Title: Apertura pagina Yelp su browser
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dettagliata di uno dei luoghi
Test Data: Un luogo con pagina Yelp associata
Test Steps: 1. Cliccare sul link alla pagina Yelp del luogo
Expected Result: Viene aperto il browser di sistema e caricata la pagina web del luogo

Title: Visualizza mappa con posizione utente e luogo
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dei suggerimenti o la pagina dettagliata di un luogo
Test Steps: 1. Aprire la pagina dei suggerimenti o la pagina dettagliata di un luogo
Expected Result: Visualizza una mappa con segnate la posizione dell’utente e la posizione del luogo suggerito

Title: Apertura mappa di sistema con destinazione impostata
Preconditions: Aver aperto una delle pagine che visualizza la mappa
Test Steps: 1. Cliccare sul tasto per aprire la mappa di sistema
Expected Result: Viene aperta l’applicazione delle mappe di sistema e il luogo suggerito è impostato come destinazione

Title: Accesso pagina impostazioni
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dei suggerimenti (pagina principale)
Test Steps: 1. Premere sul tasto delle impostazioni, posizionato a destra dell’header
Expected Result: Viene aperta la pagina delle impostazioni e visualizzata una lista delle preferenze dell’utente

Title: Modifica preferenze utente
Preconditions: Aver aperto la pagina dei suggerimenti (pagina principale)
Test Steps:
1. Premere sul tasto delle impostazioni, posizionato a destra dell’header
2. Selezionare una preferenza da modificare
Expected Result: L’utente ha la possibilità di modificare le proprie preferenze

Title: Access Pathfinder System from Main Page
Preconditions: User has opened the main suggestions page
Test Steps: 1. User clicks the "Pathfinder" button located in the header’s right side.
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the Pathfinder page, and the system begins asking preference-based questions.

Title: Display Preference Question in Pathfinder
Preconditions: User has opened the Pathfinder page and started a session
Test Steps: 1. User accesses the Pathfinder page.
Expected Result: A question related to the user’s preferences is displayed.

Title: Select Response to Preference Question
Preconditions: A question is displayed on the Pathfinder page
Test Steps:
1. User views the available response options.
2. User selects one response (e.g., "outdoor").
Expected Result: The selected response is registered, and the system proceeds to the next step (e.g., displaying a suggestion or another question).

Title: Load and Display Suggested Locations on App Launch
Preconditions: User opens the application
Test Steps: 1. User launches the application.
Expected Result: The application immediately loads and displays a list of suggested locations.

Title: Send Coordinates to System Navigator
Preconditions: User has selected a location from suggestions
Test Data: Valid GPS coordinates of the selected location
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location from the suggestions list.
2. User triggers the navigation action (e.g., clicks "naviga" or similar).
Expected Result: The system sends the location’s coordinates to the device’s navigation app for routing.

Title: Open Yelp Page for Recommended Location
Preconditions: User has selected a recommended location within the app
Test Data: A valid Yelp URL for the selected location (e.g., "https://www.yelp.com/biz/location-name-city")
Test Steps:
1. User taps on the "Open Yelp Page" button for a recommended location.
2. The app verifies the Yelp URL is correctly formatted.
3. The app launches the default browser or Yelp app with the URL.
Expected Result: The Yelp page for the selected location opens successfully without errors.

Title: Minimal Interface Components for First-Time Users
Preconditions: App is installed and launched for the first time
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app without prior usage.
2. User navigates through the main screens (home, recommendations, preferences).
Expected Result: The interface contains only essential components (e.g., buttons, input fields) and is intuitive for first-time users.

Title: Response Time for Core Functions
Preconditions: App is connected to the internet
Test Steps:
1. User requests a list of nearby locations.
2. User submits preferences to Pathfinder.
3. User taps on a recommended location to open its details.
Expected Result: All actions complete within 2 seconds or less.

Title: Error Handling for API Communication Failures
Preconditions: App is connected to the internet, then network is disrupted
Test Steps:
1. User requests location data while offline or with a poor connection.
2. The app attempts to fetch data from the API.
Expected Result: The app displays a user-friendly error message (e.g., "Unable to load data. Please check your connection.") and does not crash.

Title: Error Handling for Filesystem Operations
Preconditions: App is installed, then storage permissions are revoked
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to save preferences or cache data while storage permissions are denied.
2. The app attempts to perform a filesystem operation.
Expected Result: The app handles the error gracefully, notifies the user (e.g., "Storage access required"), and continues functioning without crashing.

Title: Compatibility with Supported OS Versions
Preconditions: App is installed on Android 5+ or iOS 13+
Test Steps:
1. Install the app on a device running Android 5.0 or higher.
2. Install the app on a device running iOS 13.0 or higher.
Expected Result: The app installs and runs without compatibility issues on both platforms.

Title: Functionality Without Internet Connection
Preconditions: App is installed, then internet connection is disabled
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to fetch nearby locations or weather data while offline.
2. User tries to submit preferences to Pathfinder.
Expected Result: The app prevents core functionality (e.g., fetching data) and displays an error message (e.g., "Internet connection required"). Cached data (if any) may still be accessible.

Title: Verify GPS functionality for location-based suggestions
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; GPS permission is granted
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Ensure GPS signal is available.
3. Navigate to the list of suggested locations.
Expected Result: The application displays nearby locations based on the user’s GPS coordinates.

Title: Verify error handling when GPS is unavailable
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; GPS signal is intentionally disabled
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Disable GPS on the device.
3. Attempt to load suggested locations.
Expected Result: The application either displays an error message or a fallback notification indicating GPS is required.

Title: Verify Pathfinder server dependency for AI suggestions
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; Pathfinder server is intentionally offline
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the Pathfinder suggestion feature.
3. Attempt to use the AI suggestion system.
Expected Result: The application either displays an error message or disables the Pathfinder feature, indicating the server is unavailable.

Title: Verify Pathfinder functionality with active server
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; Pathfinder server is online
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Navigate to the Pathfinder suggestion feature.
3. Request an AI-based suggestion.
Expected Result: The application displays a location suggested by the Pathfinder AI system.

Title: Verify response time for loading suggested locations
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; GPS and internet are available
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Measure the time taken to load the list of suggested locations.
Expected Result: The list of suggested locations loads within 2 seconds.

Title: Verify minimum storage requirement for installation
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Device with less than 100MB free storage
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to install the application on a device with 99MB free storage.
Expected Result: The installation fails with an error message indicating insufficient storage.

Title: Verify clean uninstallation
Preconditions: Application is installed
Test Steps: 1. Uninstall the application from the device.
Expected Result: All files associated with the application are removed, leaving no residual data.

Title: Verify compatibility with Android 5+
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on an Android 5.0 device.
2. Open and navigate through the application.
Expected Result: The application functions correctly without crashes or compatibility issues.

Title: Verify compatibility with iOS 13+
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on an iOS 13.0 device.
2. Open and navigate through the application.
Expected Result: The application functions correctly without crashes or compatibility issues.

Title: Verify display of suggested locations on app launch
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; GPS and internet are available
Test Steps: 1. Open the application.
Expected Result: The application displays a list of suggested locations.

Title: Verify opening a suggested location in the system navigator
Preconditions: Application is opened; suggested locations are loaded
Test Steps:
1. Select a suggested location.
2. Tap the option to open it in the system navigator.
Expected Result: The system navigator (e.g., Google Maps) opens and displays the selected location.

Title: Verify opening a suggested location’s Yelp page
Preconditions: Application is opened; suggested locations are loaded
Test Steps:
1. Select a suggested location.
2. Tap the option to open its Yelp page.
Expected Result: The system browser opens and loads the Yelp page for the selected location.

Title: Verify side effects of preference changes
Preconditions: Application is opened; user is on the suggestions page; notifications are enabled
Test Steps:
1. Modify a preference that requires a refresh (e.g., change location filters).
2. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The application either refreshes the suggestions list or prompts the user to reopen the app to apply changes.

Title: Verify internet dependency for application functionality
Preconditions: Application is installed and opened; internet connection is intentionally disabled
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Attempt to load suggested locations.
Expected Result: The application either displays an error message or a fallback notification indicating internet is required.

Title: Verify minimum Android OS version requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to install the application on an Android device running version 4.4.
2. Observe the installation process or error message.
Expected Result: Installation should fail with an error indicating the OS version is not supported.

Title: Verify minimum iOS version requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to install the application on an iOS device running version 12.5.
2. Observe the installation process or error message.
Expected Result: Installation should fail with an error indicating the OS version is not supported.

Title: Verify geolocation hardware requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android device with disabled geolocation hardware
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to launch the application with geolocation hardware disabled.
2. Observe the application behavior or error message.
Expected Result: Application should display an error or prompt to enable geolocation.

Title: Verify minimum storage requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Android device with 90 MB free storage
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to install the application on a device with 90 MB free storage.
2. Observe the installation process or error message.
Expected Result: Installation should fail with an error indicating insufficient storage space.

Title: Verify geolocation coverage requirement
Preconditions: None
Test Data: Device in an area with no geolocation signal
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application in an area with no geolocation signal.
2. Attempt to use a feature requiring location data.
3. Observe the application behavior or error message.
Expected Result: Application should display an error indicating no geolocation signal or disable location-dependent features.

Title: Verify location availability on Yelp
Preconditions: Device with active internet and geolocation
Test Data: Device in a location not listed on Yelp
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application in a location not available on Yelp.
2. Attempt to access location-based features.
3. Observe the application behavior or error message.
Expected Result: Application should display an error or restrict features for unsupported locations.
